source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
artist: Keystone View Company (copyrighted 1898 by B. L. Singley)
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain, pre-1928 U.S. publication)
title: Starting for the Gold Fields on Norway sleds, Haines, Alaska
description: Original stereograph card (1898) showing a party of Klondike gold prospectors with Norwegian ("Norway") sleds, pack animals, and guides preparing to leave Haines Mission for the gold fields over the Dalton Trail. Published by the Keystone View Company, Meadville, PA.
alt: Historic 1898 stereograph of Klondike gold prospectors with Norway sleds and pack animals at Haines, Alaska
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — downloaded from loc.gov JSON API (stereo 1s49666) and visually confirmed
